---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for GHEVERHAN Commerce Platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: mrifatsyauqi
---

# Feature Request

Thank you for helping improve GHEVERHAN Commerce Platform.

Please complete this template before requesting a new feature.

---

# 1. Feature Summary

Provide a short description of the requested feature.

Example:

- Wishlist
- Product Comparison
- Multi Warehouse
- Flash Sale

---

# 2. Business Problem

What business problem does this feature solve?

Describe:

- Current limitation
- Pain point
- User problem

---

# 3. Business Value

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Increase Sales
- [ ] Improve User Experience
- [ ] Improve Admin Productivity
- [ ] Reduce Manual Work
- [ ] Improve Performance
- [ ] Improve Security
- [ ] Improve Maintainability

Explain the expected business impact.

---

# 4. Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed solution.

Explain:

- User Flow
- Expected Behavior
- Functional Scope

---

# 5. Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternatives you have considered.

---

# 6. User Stories

Example:

As a customer

I want to save products

So I can purchase them later.

Add additional stories if necessary.

---

# 7. Acceptance Criteria

Example:

- [ ] Customer can save products.
- [ ] Wishlist is visible in Profile.
- [ ] Wishlist supports pagination.
- [ ] Guest users cannot access Wishlist.

---

# 8. Blueprint References

List related Blueprint documents.

Examples:

- docs/modules/15_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT.md
- docs/modules/16_SHOPPING_CART.md
- docs/modules/17_CHECKOUT.md

---

# 9. Roadmap Classification

Select one.

- [ ] MVP
- [ ] Growth
- [ ] Enterprise

---

# 10. Affected Modules

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] CMS
- [ ] Website Builder
- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Customer
- [ ] Checkout
- [ ] Payment
- [ ] Shipping
- [ ] Notification

---

# 11. Non-Functional Requirements

Select if applicable.

- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Scalability
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] SEO

Provide details if necessary.

---

# 12. Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know?

---

# 13. Final Checklist

- [ ] Blueprint Reviewed
- [ ] Business Value Explained
- [ ] Acceptance Criteria Defined
- [ ] Roadmap Classification Selected
